title: leucaena macrophylla
intro: Leucaena macrophylla, also known as the tropical tree or kuka tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a legume tree native to Central America and Mexico, used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is rich in isoflavones, which have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving bone health, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Leucaena macrophylla is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and supplements, to support overall health and well-being.
